repo_signals: L3 smoke for platform.terraform: HCL provider blocks, remote tfstate with locking, terraform plan vs apply, module composition, drift detection, and import of existing infrastructure
write a bash script to rotate local log files

retrieval_query: terraform hcl provider resource remote state locking plan apply drift module import tfstate secrets backend

validation_smoke.name: platform.terraform L3 validation smoke
signals: terraform plan reviewed with zero unexpected destroys
state lock acquired and released cleanly
post-apply plan shows no drift (no changes)
no secrets present in state or plan output

diagnosis_smoke.name: platform.terraform diagnosis smoke
signals: apply run without reviewing a saved plan
local state with no locking on a shared environment
hardcoded secret in a .tf file or variable default
drift between real infrastructure and state
resource replacement (destroy/create) not noticed before apply
